title: Patient Triage Assistant
summary: Structure intake notes into triage-ready summaries, escalation flags, and care handoff context.

sample_features.query: Summarize the highest priority risk and recommended next step.

knowledge_base: Patient Triage Assistant is positioned as a HealthTech starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Structure intake notes into triage-ready summaries, escalation flags, and care handoff context.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on triage, health, assistant.
